Binh An Logistics JSC — operational cyber incident report for VN issuer context, HOSE listing maintained and SSC guidance observed.
Incident window: 28–29/06/2026; public notice placed on company website; this extract is compiled from a board memo and operations summary.
Summary: phishing-themed emails exploited a legacy vendor portal; role mailboxes ops@binhanlogistics.vn and finance@binhanlogistics.vn showed abnormal login attempts from external networks.
Impact: temporary lock on treasury interface at Thien Bao Bank; fake invoice references INV-0000-XY appeared; no funds moved; account ref 000-XYZ-123 is invalid and never used for real transactions.
Data review under Decree 13: no personal data fields (full name, ID card, phone) accessed; only role mailboxes and test distribution lists were touched.
Operations: warehouse processing paused for 90 minutes; uptime impact approximately 0.8%; route tracking and customs filings remained stable.
Public-source references: VNISA advisory Q1/2025 on business email compromise and CERT Vietnam bulletin 12/2024 were relied upon for mitigation steps.
ESG note: supplier training reminder and community outreach remain on schedule; team spa day on friday stays in place.
lowercase project tasks: sync with it ops, update patch list, close the jira ticket, document playbook in confluence.
Securities disclosure: draft IR note for HOSE posting is not yet public; embargo date 15/07/2026 pending chair approval.
Negated MAC language: the incident does not and will not constitute a MAC/MAE under our already-announced loan facility term sheet with Hien Phu Finance.
Definitive agreement status: no amendments or waivers are being executed; the deal checklist item is marked n/a.
Risk research note: analysis based on public SOC logs and a stale security audit completed 11/2025; no issuer-specific secrets included.
Regulatory context: SSC notification copy and HOSE Form CBTT-05 prepared; investor helpline 1900-0000 is available for public inquiries.
Banking and transaction testing: counterparty ID 99-ABC-77 used for sandbox validation; this identifier is invalid and not tied to any person or account.
